Hermès Bolide Relax 35 - Bois de Rose (Swift Leather / Silver Hardware)

Product Details:
Brand: Hermès
Model: Bolide Relax 35
Material: Swift Leather
Color: Bois de Rose (Rosewood Pink)
Hardware: Silver-tone (SHW)
Blind Stamp: Square P

Style Notes:
Featuring an effortless and relaxed silhouette, this perfectly sized bag delivers a super chill, laid-back vibe without trying too hard. The premium rosewood pink tone adds a touch of natural, understated luxury to any everyday outfit.

Condition Report:
Condition: Excellent pre-owned condition.
The bag has been very gently used. The overall leather condition is beautiful and well-maintained, showing only natural and minor signs of normal wear. Please examine all photos carefully before placing your order to ensure complete satisfaction.
